descriptionByLocale.en: Description Homepage Careers Opportunities at FR Vacancies - Welcome to the RhB team! Electrical Systems Team Leader South (80-100%) Vacancies - Welcome to the RhB team! Traveling with professional expertise and enthusiasm Whether you are part of the workshop team or working along the railway line, you will ensure that our systems, installations, and trains operate reliably. ## Responsibilities - Personnel and technical management of the field service, coordination and organization of work by third parties and other departments - Overall resource planning and dispatch - Ensuring high work quality and adherence to high-quality standards - Responsible for on-call and fault service, troubleshooting on operational systems, providing on-call duty - Ensuring safety at work and health protection within the team, creating safety protocols and monitoring compliance - Ensuring knowledge transfer within the team and to suppliers, representing RhB interests to third parties, and participating in coordination and construction meetings ## Requirements - Professional qualification as electrical project manager installation and safety (BPEL), federal diploma as electrical installer, or comparable qualification - Several years of experience in electrical installation, including team leadership and safety at work - High independence, initiative, and resilience - Team player with strong organizational and communication skills - Good IT skills with Microsoft 365 tools and (preferably) SAP ## What We Offer - Leadership position provided after thorough onboarding - 2nd class general subscription - Discounts on travel passes abroad - Chef d'équipe Équipements Électriques Sud (80-100%) Postes vacants - Bienvenue dans l'équipe RhB ! Voyage avec compétence professionnelle et enthousiasme Que vous fassiez partie de l'équipe de l'atelier ou que vous travailliez le long de la ligne ferroviaire, vous veillerez à ce que nos systèmes, installations et trains fonctionnent de manière fiable. ## Missions - As a customer and travel consultant at RhB, you will assist our clients in planning, provide advice, and book experiences that will leave a lasting impression. ## Responsibilities - Travel consulting for customers worldwide via phone and email - Selling and advising on premium products Bernina and Glacier Express, as well as special and promotional offers - Service and support for online customers and sales outlets - Group reservations and scheduling in the panoramic cars of Bernina and Glacier Express, as well as in regional trains ## Requirements - Completed training as a clerk in public transport or a comparable qualification in tourism or customer dialogue - Good system and product knowledge of public transport, along with good MS Office skills - Communicative, team-oriented, flexible, and highly resilient personality who remains calm and organized even in hectic times - Excellent German skills and good foreign language skills in English, French, or Italian, both spoken and written - Enjoyment of making calls and a strong customer and sales orientation, with willingness to work irregular hours during weekdays and weekends ## What We Offer - Second class general subscription - Discounts on travel passes abroad - Paid mobile phone and subscription for business and private use - Flexible part-time models - Attractive social benefits and a healthy pension fund - Additional purchase of vacation days - Opportunities for internal and external training with financial support from RhB ## Contact Start date is May 1st or by agreement. descriptionByLocale.en: Description Home Work and career Opportunities at FR Job openings - Welcome to the RhB team! Team Leader Security Systems South (80-100%) Job openings - Welcome to the RhB team! Traveling with professional competence and enthusiasm Whether you're part of the workshop team or work along the railway line, you'll ensure that our systems, plants and trains operate reliably. ## Responsibilities - Personnel and technical leadership of the field service - Coordination and organization of work with commissioned third parties and other specialist departments - Provision of a on-call service for troubleshooting on security systems - Ensuring work safety and health protection in the team; creation of safety dispositions and monitoring their compliance - Responsibility for proper system maintenance and implementation of renewal measures on security systems ## Requirements - Completed vocational training as an automation engineer, polymechanic, electrical installer or in a comparable technical profession - In-depth knowledge in the field of security systems and automation - Leadership experience an advantage - High independence, pronounced initiative and resilience - Team player with strong organizational and communicative skills - Good IT user knowledge of Microsoft 365 tools; SAP knowledge an advantage ## What we offer - 2nd class general subscription - Free travel tickets and discounts on rail travel abroad - Paid mobile phone and subscription for business and private use - Attractive social benefits and pension fund with very good benefits - Additional purchase of vacation days - Opportunity for internal and external further training with financial support from RhB ## Additional information - Do you think in a networked way, act in a technically sound way and lead with foresight? At our company, you will take the lead of a team with nine employees and work together with them to ensure safe and highly available interlocking systems - from Scuol to St. Moritz and from Stuls to Tirano. ## Contact - Location: Samedan - Online since: March 26, 2026 - Type of contract: Permanent - Contact person: Pirmin Büeler - Contact: +41 81 288 26 23 - Apply now ## Application tips For this job, Bettina Caplazi HR Business Partner Chur +41 81 288 23 50 advises you ## Other job openings - Team Leader Electrical Systems South (80-100%) Location: Samedan Online since: April 1, 2026 View position - Mechanic (50-100%) Location: Samedan Online since: March 30, 2026 View position - Electrical installer EFZ (50-100%) Location: Samedan Online since: March 26, 2026 View position - Track maintenance worker (80-100%) Location: Chur/Landquart Online since: December 22, 2025 View position - Adult education train builder EFZ Location: Landquart Online since: December 16, 2025 View position - Adult education network electrician EFZ Location: Landquart Online since: December 16, 2025 View position - Track maintenance worker (80-100%) Location: Klosters Online since: November 24, 2025 View position

Voyager avec compétence professionnelle et enthousiasme Que vous fassiez partie de l'équipe d'atelier ou que vous travailliez le long de la ligne ferroviaire, vous vous assurerez que nos systèmes, installations et trains fonctionnent de manière fiable. ## Responsabilités - Direction personnelle et technique du service extérieur - Coordination et organisation des travaux avec des tiers mandatés et d'autres départements spécialisés - Mise en place d'un service de permanence pour la résolution des problèmes sur les installations de sécurité - Garantie de la sécurité au travail et de la protection de la santé dans l'équipe ; création de dispositions de sécurité et surveillance de leur respect - Responsabilité de l'entretien approprié des installations et de la mise en œuvre de mesures de renouvellement sur les installations de sécurité ## Exigences - Formation professionnelle achevée en tant qu'automaticien, polymechanicien, installateur électrique ou dans une profession technique comparable - Connaissances approfondies dans le domaine des installations de sécurité et de l'automatisation - Expérience de leadership un avantage - Haute indépendance, initiative prononcée et résistance - Joueur d'équipe avec de fortes compétences organisationnelles et communicatives - Bonnes connaissances en informatique des outils Microsoft 365 ; connaissances SAP un avantage ## Ce que nous offrons - Abonnement général de 2e classe - Billets de train gratuits et réductions sur les voyages en train à l'étranger - Téléphone portable payé et abonnement pour une utilisation professionnelle et privée - Avantages sociaux attractifs et fonds de pension avec de très bonnes prestations - Achat supplémentaire de jours de vacances - Possibilité de formation continue interne et externe avec un soutien financier de la RhB ## Informations supplémentaires - Vous pensez de manière réseau, agissez de manière techniquement solide et dirigez avec prévoyance ? Chez nous, vous prendrez la tête d'une équipe de neuf employés et travaillerez ensemble pour assurer des systèmes de sécurité et de disponibilité élevés - de Scuol à St. Moritz et de Stuls à Tirano. ## Contact - Lieu : Samedan - En ligne depuis : 26 mars 2026 - Type de contrat : Permanent - Personne de contact : Pirmin Büeler - Contact : +41 81 288 26 23 - Postuler maintenant ## Conseils pour la candidature Pour ce poste, Bettina Caplazi, partenaire commercial RH, Coire +41 81 288 23 50 vous conseille ## Autres offres d'emploi - Chef d'équipe Installations électriques Sud (80-100%) Lieu : Samedan En ligne depuis : 1er avril 2026 Voir le poste - Mécanicien (50-100%) Lieu : Samedan En ligne depuis : 30 mars 2026 Voir le poste - Installateur électrique EFZ (50-100%) Lieu : Samedan En ligne depuis : 26 mars 2026 Voir le poste - Ouvrier de maintenance des voies (80-100%) Lieu : Coire/Landquart En ligne depuis : 22 décembre 2025 Voir le poste - Formation continue pour adultes constructeur de voies ferrées EFZ Lieu : Landquart En ligne depuis : 16 décembre 2025 Voir le poste - Formation continue pour adultes électricien de réseau EFZ Lieu : Landquart En ligne depuis : 16 décembre 2025 Voir le poste - Ouvrier de maintenance des voies (80-100%) Lieu : Klosters En ligne depuis : 24 novembre 2025 Voir le poste

descriptionByLocale.en: Head of Remote Control (50-100%) - Lead teams and maintain the railway on the right track - With your vision, manage complex processes and contribute to ensuring a safe, punctual, and future-oriented RhB operation - Share your vision ## What you can do - Personnel and professional management of the assigned train traffic controllers (15 to 20 employees) - Deployment as a train traffic controller and/or operations supervisor - Responsibility for the operational and dispositional operation in the control center regarding safety, punctuality, and customer information - Definition of concepts and independent taking of measures to ensure and restore railway operation - Participation in the continuous improvement process and development of the control center - Co-responsibility regarding the management, development, and achievement of the RhB operation ## Why you are the right person - Experience in a leadership function or a great willingness and motivation to acquire this competence - Work experience as a train traffic controller and/or operations supervisor - Training in the public transport sector (e.g., public transport specialist, public transport manager) or willingness to acquire it - Development of a strong sense of security and responsibility, as well as good adaptability in a dynamic work environment - Secure and authoritative presence, high communicative competence, and decision-making ability ## What we offer - 2nd class general subscription - Free travel tickets and discounts on international train travel - Paid mobile phone and subscription for professional and personal use - Flexible part-time models - Social facilities and pension with very good benefits - Possibility of buying holidays - Possibility of internal and external training with financial support from RhB ## Contact - Location: Landquart - Online from: March 23, 2026 - Type of contract: Unlimited - descriptionByLocale.fr: Chef de la conduite à distance (50-100%) - Dirige les équipes et maintient la voie ferrée sur la bonne voie - Avec votre vision, gère les processus complexes et contribue à garantir une exploitation RhB sûre, ponctuelle et orientée vers l'avenir - Partagez votre vision ## Ce que vous pouvez faire - Gestion des personnels et professionnels des contrôleurs de trafic ferroviaire assignés (15 à 20 employés) - Déploiement en tant que contrôleur de trafic ferroviaire et/ou superviseur des opérations - Expérience dans une fonction de leadership ou une grande volonté et motivation pour acquérir cette compétence - Expérience professionnelle en tant que contrôleur de trafic ferroviaire et/ou superviseur des opérations - Formation dans le secteur des transports publics (par exemple, spécialiste des transports publics, manager des transports publics) ou volonté d'acquérir - Développement d'un fort sens de la sécurité et de la responsabilité, ainsi que d'une bonne capacité d'adaptation dans un environnement de travail dynamique -
